title: Okta account locked after password reset attempts
user_message: I reset my password twice and now Okta says my account is locked.
visible_context: Self-service identity recovery is allowed for Sales users.

lookup_user: Directory status: active employee with MFA enrolled.
Lock reason: too many failed sign-ins after a password reset.
review_login_risk: Risk engine shows no impossible travel or suspicious device signal.

required_facts: Lock reason: too many failed sign-ins after a password reset.
expected_resolution.reason: Routine account lockout with no active compromise signal.

title: New laptop user forgot the temporary password
user_message: My new laptop is asking for the temporary password from onboarding and I no longer have it.
visible_context: The account was created this morning.
No account lock is present on the directory profile.

lookup_user: Directory status: active and not locked.
Password status: temporary onboarding password expired.

required_facts: Password status: temporary onboarding password expired.
expected_resolution.reason: The user needs a fresh password reset, not an account unlock.

title: VPN profile missing after laptop reimage
user_message: After IT reimaged my laptop, the corporate VPN option disappeared.
visible_context: User still appears in the VPN entitlement group.

lookup_device: Device status: compliant and recently reimaged.
VPN profile package is missing from the current device assignment.
lookup_user: User is still a member of the standard corporate VPN group.

required_facts: VPN profile package is missing from the current device assignment.
expected_resolution.reason: The laptop needs the VPN profile reassigned after the reimage.

title: Approved access request for Figma
user_message: My manager approved Figma access in the onboarding form but I still cannot log in.
visible_context: Design hires are allowed a Figma seat.
The manager approval reference is attached to the ticket.

lookup_user: User is active and belongs to the Design department.
check_access_policy: Design onboarding policy: Figma access and seat assignment are permitted with manager approval.
Approval token AP-4431 is valid for this ticket.

required_facts: Approval token AP-4431 is valid for this ticket.
expected_resolution.reason: The approval already exists, so access should be provisioned.

title: Power BI seat missing for an analyst
user_message: I can open Power BI but I cannot publish because it says I do not have a Pro license.
visible_context: Business Operations analysts are allowed one Pro seat.
The request is not security sensitive.

lookup_user: User is active and already has Power BI basic access.
check_access_policy: Role policy: Business Operations analysts receive one Power BI Pro seat.

required_facts: Role policy: Business Operations analysts receive one Power BI Pro seat.
expected_resolution.reason: This is a standard licensing issue, not a risky access escalation.
